channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: What to Know About the Potential U.S.-Iran Peace Deal - The New York Times
item.description:
1. What to Know About the Potential U.S.-Iran Peace Deal  The New York Times
  2. Trump says Iran negotiations proceeding in 'orderly and constructive manner;' warns against rushing  CNBC
  3. Trump says Iran deal is 'largely negotiated', would reopen Strait of Hormuz  Reuters
  4. Trump says Iran deal to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated'  Fox News
  5. Trump says US will not ‘rush’ into any Iran deal following GOP criticism  The Hill

item.description:
1. Russia hits Kyiv with hypersonic ballistic missile in ‘deranged’ attack  The Guardian

item.title: US-Iran deal said to open strait for 60 days, push off talks on regime’s nuclear program - The Times of Israel

item.title: Rubio fends off conservative critics of Iran deal as agreement appears imminent - The Washington Post

item.title: What will Trump do next with Iran? - NPR
item.description:
1. What will Trump do next with Iran?  NPR

  4. Opinion | Trump and Fox News are trapped in a doom loop on Iran  MS NOW
  5. Donald Trump is still looking for a quick fix in Iran  The Economist
